title: Request for Proposals (RFP) for Debt Collection Services
description: Kairuki University (KU) invites proposals from reputable and experienced debt collection firms to provide professional debt recovery services on behalf of the University. Scope: Collect outstanding debts owed to KU by former and current students as well as other debtors; conduct collections in a professional and ethical manner; provide regular progress reports and account reconciliations; advise the University on strategies to strengthen debt recovery and credit control processes.

contact.name: The Tender Board
contact.address: Kairuki University, P.O. Box 65300, Dar es Salaam, Tanzania

eligibility: Valid business registration and operating licenses in Tanzania; proven track record in debt collection; qualified staff; capacity to handle large volumes; strong internal controls.
